HERMÈS Mini Halzan Bag - Bambou Green Swift Leather with Silver Hardware

Product Details:
Brand: Hermès
Model: Mini Halzan
Material: Swift Leather
Color: Bambou Green
Hardware: Palladium / Silver Hardware (PHW)
Dimensions: 22 x 15 x 7 cm

Features:
An elegant and very versatile piece with an artistic touch. The unique design of the Halzan allows it to be worn in 6 distinct ways — fold it into a sleek clutch, carry it as a chic handheld tote, or use the strap for shoulder or crossbody wear. Made from luxurious Swift leather, which perfectly showcases the vibrant Bambou Green hue. With the market value of this model constantly increasing, it's a fantastic investment piece offered at a great price.

Condition:
The bag is in excellent, pre-owned original condition. Please review all photos carefully before placing your order to appreciate its beautiful state.
